summary: Reposted Fox News segment featuring the DHS Secretary. A live studio shot at lower left shows the Secretary, a bearded man, speaking, while a blurred close-up of an older man fills the background. A lower-third reads 'MARKWAYNE MULLIN | DHS SECRETARY' and 'SENATE ADVANCES DHS, I.C.E. FUNDING PLAN,' with a 'LIVE' tag and a promo for Trump affordability remarks. A burned-in caption reads 'AND YOU'RE FOR THE CRIMINALS.' The audio is the Secretary criticizing Senator Schumer over the DHS funding standoff.

script.scene: Live shot of the DHS Secretary speaking at lower left over a blurred close-up of an older man; chyron 'SENATE ADVANCES DHS, I.C.E. FUNDING PLAN,' caption 'AND YOU'RE FOR THE CRIMINALS.'
